content_fingerprint: llama cpp router fix brings audio transcription support to proxy mode a bug fix merged into llama cpp allows the server s router component to forward multipart form data including audio files to model backends resolving a gap that blocked v1 audio transcriptions calls in routed deployments llama cpp has shipped commit b8952 a targeted fix to its server router that enables form data to be forwarded through the proxy layer to model servers the change resolves issue 22044 which had prevented the v1 audio transcriptions endpoint from working when llama cpp is running in router mode the fix involve
